$comment: Reference case for hooke_spring (F = -k * (x - restLength)). Single coefficient (k, spring constant). Two inputs — displacement sweep plus a fixed rest length. A straightforward linear-response fit that the LM should nail within a handful of iterations.
notes: Linear in k — the fitter should recover k exactly. rmse_max=0.5 is lenient because the observed magnitude scales with k; relative-tolerance on k keeps the real assertion tight.
